texto: Where kairos is an event word—something that has a beginning and ending—repentance (metanoia) is a process word, as is believe (pistis). The Circle is a process, a way of living that does not have a specific beginning and ending. One does not become a disciple of Jesus and stand still; discipleship is a lifestyle of learning. And this learning begins with a change of heart.
explicacao: Citação de Mike Breen sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Where kairos is an event word—something that has a beginning and ending—repentance (metanoia) is …” articula vida, belief, discipleship em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
